channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11715] sanity-lsnapshot test_0: Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e8f02f56-ef71-11e8-b67f-52540065bddc

test_0 failed with the following error:

(5) Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment

Only hit on EL7.6

Create lss_0_2 with comment
CMD: trevis-40vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl snapshot_create -F lustre -n lss_0_2 -c 'This is test_0'
trevis-40vm9: Can't create the snapshot lss_0_2
CMD: trevis-40vm9 cat /var/log/lsnapshot.log
Fri Nov 23 00:07:22 2018 (8236:jt_snapshot_create:1461:lustre:ssh): Create snapshot lss_0_0 successfully with comment , barrier , timeout 
Fri Nov 23 00:07:52 2018 (8986:jt_snapshot_create:1461:lustre:ssh): Create snapshot lss_0_1 successfully with comment , barrier , timeout 
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:29 2018 (9770:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Fri Nov 23 00:08:52 2018 (9770:jt_snapshot_create:1454:lustre:ssh): Can't create snapshot lss_0_2 with comment  barrier , timeout : -110
 sanity-lsnapshot test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: (5) Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-lsnapshot test_0 - (5) Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment
item.summary: sanity-lsnapshot test_0: Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
We've hit various sanity-lsnapshot test 0 errors continuously this year; 52 failures in the first 10 months of 2019.

We see a variety of issues that look similar, but the root cause of the failure may be different. I will attribute the failures below to this ticket.

In addition to the '(5) Fail to create lss_0_2 with comment' error, we also see:

CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl snapshot_create -F lustre -n lss_0_3 --barrier=on -c 'Another one'
trevis-36vm8: Can't create the snapshot lss_0_3
CMD: trevis-36vm8 cat /var/log/lsnapshot.log
Wed Oct  9 09:28:14 2019 (14844:jt_snapshot_create:1461:lustre:ssh): Create snapshot lss_0_0 successfully with comment <(null)>, barrier <enable>, timeout <30>
Wed Oct  9 09:28:45 2019 (15576:jt_snapshot_create:1461:lustre:ssh): Create snapshot lss_0_1 successfully with comment <(null)>, barrier <disable>, timeout <-1>
Wed Oct  9 09:29:16 2019 (16325:jt_snapshot_create:1461:lustre:ssh): Create snapshot lss_0_2 successfully with comment <This is test_0>, barrier <enable>, timeout <30>
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:29:49 2019 (17076:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Wed Oct  9 09:30:02 2019 (17076:jt_snapshot_create:1454:lustre:ssh): Can't create snapshot lss_0_3 with comment <Another one> barrier <enable>, timeout <30>: -110
 sanity-lsnapshot test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: (7) Fail to create lss_0_3 with barrier and comment

at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3983b1a2-eb81-11e9-a0ba-52540065bddc

trevis-34vm4: Can't create the snapshot lss_0_0
CMD: trevis-34vm4 cat /var/log/lsnapshot.log
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:32:22 2019 (9868:snapshot_create:1390:lustre:ssh): The barrier expired on lustre
Sat Oct  5 10:33:17 2019 (9868:jt_snapshot_create:1454:lustre:ssh): Can't create snapshot lss_0_0 with comment  barrier , timeout : -110
 sanity-lsnapshot test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: (1) Fail to create lss_0_0 with default

at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7482dc5e-e859-11e9-b62b-52540065bddc
